title: Pin Definition
description: Defines a pin in a symbol definition. See https://dev-docs.kicad.org/en/file-formats/sexpr-intro/index.html#_symbol_pin

pin_electrical_type.$comment: The PIN_ELECTRICAL_TYPE defines the pin electrical connection.
pin_electrical_type.title: Electrical type

pin_graphic_style.title: Graphical Style
pin_graphic_style.description: The graphical style used to draw the pin

position_identifier.title: Position
position_identifier.description: The X and Y coordinates and rotation angle of the connection point of the pin relative to the symbol origin position.

x.title: X
x.description: The horizontal position of the object.

y.title: Y
y.description: The vertical position of the object.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: The rotational angle of the object
